name: Stellar Crimson Fog Generator
desc: A mysterious energy generator defying modern physics, emitting high-energy crimson stellar particles to form a fog-like shield. Most conventional weapons in the Perseus Sector cannot penetrate this barrier, and the particles actively retaliate against hostile targets. Orbital bombardment and raids are nearly impossible until the facility is disabled.

name: Temple of Iris
desc: "The dwelling of the 'Omniscient Deity'... or the source of the castle's ability to float in the void. Though its inner workings are unknown, it clearly houses a computational entity surpassing even multiple Omega Cores...

name: Crimson Treasury Vault
desc: A vault of endless treasures from another realm... or so the inscription claims. What lies within? Perhaps secrets of the cosmos beyond imagination?

name: Primordial Workshop
desc: A ship weapon R&D facility within the castle. Requires minimal resources for automated production of high-quality armaments. How do they achieve this? Unknown.

name: Fortress District
desc: A literal castle floating in space, its obsidian-like structure defying logic. The origin of its name 'Crimson Citadel' remains a mystery.

name: Kingdom Reflection
desc: The sole artificial structure on the planet—a surreal castle complex. Only beings from another realm could comprehend its true nature.

name: Stardust Quantum Node
desc: Replaces conventional spaceports with quantum teleporters. The castle's inhabitants utilize unimaginable teleportation technology in daily life.

name: Integrated Titan Metropolis
desc: A megacity housing and pacifying colossal beasts, eliminating external threats. Maintenance is costly due to their voracious appetites.

name: Planetary Abyssal Resonance
desc: A subnode of the Wraith Network links to ancient leviathans in the abyss. Communication requires resources, but the rewards justify the cost.
